sections: H1: Etsy Digital Planner Sizes — The Complete Size Guide for Sellers
QuickAnswer box: 'The most common digital planner sizes on Etsy are A4 (2480×3508 px), A5 (1748×2480 px), US Letter (2550×3300 px), and Half Letter (1275×1650 px). All at 300 DPI.'
H2: The 4 Standard Digital Planner Page Sizes (with pixel dimensions at 300 DPI)
H2: GoodNotes, Notability & iPad Optimized Sizes — What Ratio to Use
H2: Hyperlinked vs. Non-Hyperlinked Planners — Does Size Affect It?
H2: How to Package Multiple Planner Sizes for Etsy Without Manual Resizing
H2: Planner Cover vs. Interior Page Sizes — Are They Different?

H2_sizes.title: The 4 Standard Digital Planner Page Sizes
content_notes: A4 portrait: 2480×3508 px @ 300 DPI — most popular internationally, ISO standard
A5 portrait: 1748×2480 px @ 300 DPI — half of A4, popular for compact planners
US Letter: 2550×3300 px @ 300 DPI — 8.5×11 inches, US/Canada standard
Half Letter: 1275×1650 px @ 300 DPI — 5.5×8.5 inches, popular for mini planners
A6: 1240×1748 px @ 300 DPI — niche but popular for pocket planners
Include a size comparison diagram showing all 5 side-by-side with physical dimensions
Note: All these are portrait orientation. Landscape versions exist but are niche.

H2_goodnotes_ipad.title: GoodNotes, Notability & iPad Optimized Sizes
content_notes: GoodNotes default canvas is A4 — 2480×3508 px matches perfectly
iPad screen aspect ratio is 4:3 — A4/A5 are 1:√2 (ISO) and don't fill screen edge-to-edge
Many sellers offer both ISO (A4/A5) AND 'iPad optimized' versions (roughly 2048×2732 px for 12.9" iPad Pro)
Key insight: Buyers will ask for 'GoodNotes size' — A4 is the correct answer 90% of the time
SnapToSize angle: ISO A-series pack covers A5 and A4 in one upload — sellers don't need to manually create both

H2_packaging.title: How to Package Multiple Planner Sizes for Etsy Without Manual Resizing
content_notes: Pain: Planner sellers create in one size (usually A4) then manually resize for A5, Letter, Half Letter
Manual process: open Canva/Photoshop, change artboard, re-export, repeat for each page of the planner
For a 50-page planner × 4 sizes = 200 exports manually
SnapToSize solution: Upload your master planner page → get ISO A-series pack (A5, A4, A3, A2, A1) in one ZIP

Limitation to be honest about: SnapToSize is designed for wall art / print files. For planners with embedded hyperlinks, the PDF structure with live links requires a different workflow. For static planner page images/covers without hyperlinks, SnapToSize handles resizing perfectly.
CTA: 'Start with your cover page and key interior templates — resize them all in one upload'

H2_cover_interior.title: Planner Cover vs. Interior Page Sizes
content_notes: Cover pages are typically the same size as interior pages in digital planners
Exception: Some sellers use a wider cover (landscape A4) paired with portrait interior pages
Interior page types: daily, weekly, monthly, notes — all same canvas size
Divider tabs and sticker sheets may use different sizes (often A4 landscape or custom)

keywords.competitor_gaps: Most competitors (Canva templates, Etsy seller blogs) list sizes without pixel dimensions at 300 DPI. GoodNotes/iPad-specific advice is missing — sellers search 'GoodNotes size' and get generic answers. No one explains the PDF-with-hyperlinks vs. PNG-only distinction clearly. No one connects the sizing pain to a tool that automates it for static pages/covers.
keywords.conversion_angle: Pain: Planner sellers with 20-50+ page planners need to export every page at 4 different sizes = hours of manual work. Solution: SnapToSize handles the A-series pack (A5, A4 in one upload) for static page images and covers. Be honest that PDF-with-hyperlinks needs a different workflow — but for covers, sample pages, and static templates, SnapToSize saves the resizing step completely.

sections: H1: Etsy Mid Century Modern Art Sizes — What Print Dimensions Sell Best

QuickAnswer box: 'Mid century modern prints sell best in 8×10, 16×20, 18×24, and 24×36. The style works in bold geometric shapes with ochre, teal, and rust palettes — available in 2:3 and 4:5 ratio packs.'
H2: Why Mid Century Modern Art Thrives in Specific Print Sizes
H2: The 6 Best-Selling Mid Century Modern Print Sizes on Etsy
H2: 7 Mid Century Sub-Styles and Their Ideal Frame Sizes
H2: Gallery Wall Arrangements with Mid Century Modern Prints
H2: Color Palettes and Ratios That Define the Style
H2: How to Package Mid Century Modern Art for All Etsy Buyers

H2_why_sizes.title: Why Mid Century Modern Art Thrives in Specific Print Sizes
content_notes: MCM aesthetic: geometric, bold, asymmetric — needs room to breathe. Smaller sizes (5×7) lose the impact of large geometric shapes.
The style originated in the 1950s-1970s (Bauhaus, Eames Era, Atomic Age) — buyers decorating in this style tend to want statement pieces
Mid century modern interiors favor large statement walls — 18×24 and 24×36 are strong sellers
The style works equally well in 4:5 ratio (8×10, 16×20) for classic frames and 2:3 ratio (12×18, 16×24) for poster-style frames
ISO A-series (A4, A3) sells well to European buyers who decorate in this international style

H2_best_sizes.title: The 6 Best-Selling Mid Century Modern Print Sizes on Etsy
sizes: 8×10 (4:5) — 2400×3000 px @ 300 DPI — popular starter size, IKEA Ribba frames
16×20 (4:5) — 4800×6000 px @ 300 DPI — statement piece, classic MCM poster scale
18×24 (3:4) — 5400×7200 px @ 300 DPI — travel poster dimensions, very MCM-appropriate
12×18 (2:3) — 3600×5400 px @ 300 DPI — slim vertical, atomic age poster feel
24×36 (2:3) — 7200×10800 px @ 300 DPI — large format statement (Quick Export only)
A4 (ISO) — 2480×3508 px @ 300 DPI — European buyers, IKEA Hovsta frames
Include a visual size comparison chart with MCM-style frame mock previews

H2_sub_styles.title: 7 Mid Century Modern Sub-Styles and Their Ideal Frame Sizes
sub_styles: Atomic Age / Starburst — circular/radial compositions, best in square or 4:5 (8×10, 16×20)
Bauhaus Geometric — strict geometric forms, works in any ratio, especially A-series for European buyers
Eames Era Abstract — organic shapes with bold colors (ochre, rust, mustard), best in 18×24 or 16×20
Space Age / Sputnik — orbs and orbits, works well as a set in 8×10 or 5×7 gallery wall
Danish Modern / Scandi MCM — muted palette, clean lines, best in A4/A3 ISO series
MCM Landscape / Nature — stylized trees and mountains, strong in 16×24 or 12×18 (2:3 vertical)
Typography MCM — bold sans-serif type with geometric elements, best in 8×10 or 11×14

H2_gallery_wall.title: Gallery Wall Arrangements with Mid Century Modern Prints
content_notes: Classic MCM gallery wall: asymmetric grouping of 3-5 prints in mixed sizes (not uniform grid)
Popular combo: 1× 18×24 + 2× 8×10 + 1× 5×7 — varied heights, different ratios
Sellers offering 'gallery wall sets' outperform single-size listings in MCM category
Tip for sellers: include sizes for all SnapToSize packs so buyers can self-select — offer the full 2:3 pack AND the 4:5 pack
SnapToSize angle: One MCM design upload → 30+ sizes across all packs → list as complete gallery wall set bundle

H2_color_palettes.title: Color Palettes and Ratios That Define the Style
content_notes: Classic MCM palettes: ochre/mustard + teal + charcoal, burnt orange + cream + black, olive green + rust + off-white
High-contrast geometric designs show best at larger sizes — 16×20 and above
Muted Scandinavian MCM works well at smaller sizes (A5, 8×10) for desk/shelf display
Buyers searching 'mid century modern art' expect bold color — contrast with farmhouse (neutral) and coastal (soft blue) niches

H2_packaging.title: How to Package Mid Century Modern Art for All Etsy Buyers
content_notes: Pain: MCM buyers expect large statement sizes (18×24, 24×36) AND classic sizes (8×10, 16×20) in one listing
Manual workflow: resize 1 design to 6+ sizes = 1-3 hours per design
SnapToSize solution: upload master high-res MCM design → select 2:3 pack (poster sizes) + 4:5 pack (classic frames) + ISO pack (European buyers) → get organized ZIP ready to upload
Volume impact: sellers with 20+ MCM designs save 20-60 hours of resizing per collection
CTA: 'Start Free — resize your first MCM design to 30+ sizes in under 2 minutes'

keywords.competitor_gaps: Competitor pages for 'mid century modern art' on Etsy focus on style inspiration and tag advice — none provide actual pixel dimensions or ratio guidance. Farmhouse and coastal niches have dedicated size guides on competitor blogs; MCM does not. No one connects MCM to gallery wall sets with size recommendations. The sub-style breakdown (Atomic Age vs. Bauhaus vs. Eames vs. Scandi MCM) is a clear gap — buyers and sellers conflate these.
keywords.conversion_angle: Pain: MCM sellers create bold geometric statement art that needs large sizes (18×24, 24×36) but also standard sizes for classic frames. Packaging for all buyer types requires resizing the same design to 6+ sizes per artwork. SnapToSize solution: one upload covers all major MCM print sizes — 2:3 pack for poster frames, 4:5 pack for classic frames, ISO for European buyers. Sellers with 10+ MCM designs save hours of manual work per collection launch.
